pattern: Collapsing the whole array with one bitwise-AND operation always equalizes it, so the only question is whether it was already uniform.
hints: What does a single operation over the entire array produce for every element?
Bitwise AND of the same set of numbers is one fixed value, so one full-span operation makes everything identical.
If all elements already match, you need zero operations; otherwise exactly one operation on the full range suffices.

edge_inputs.description: two distinct values need one operation
values differ only in one bit
